reasoning: Over the past year, CPB has experienced a significant downward trajectory (dropping from approx $44 in late 2024 to $30 in October 2025) reflecting weak quarterly sales and flat-to-negative FY2026 guidance regarding organic growth and declining EPS. On a short-term basis, the stock has shown somewhat of a stabilization around $29-30, but the general lack of short-term catalysts and fundamentally weak guidance favors a slight downward drift, countering the normal positive equity premium. Since weekly and monthly stock moves are largely unpredictable (close to a random walk), I am structuring my probabilities slightly below 50% for the short-term, with uncertainty and reversion to the mean increasing towards 0.50 for the longer-horizon January 2026 date.
